Are We There Yet? (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $82,674,398Details
International Box Office $15,440,073
Worldwide Box Office $98,114,471
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$18,575,214 (22.5% of total gross)
Legs:4.45 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:84.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,709 opening theaters/2,810 max. theaters, 7.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $145,873,225

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 21st, 2005 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: March 11th, 2005 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: May 24th, 2005 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for language and rude humor.
Running Time: 94 minutes
Franchise: Are We There Yet?
Plot point: African Americans, Children Trying to Reunite Divorced Parents, Dysfunctional Family, Exes in Love, Road Trip, Romance
Subgenre: Family Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Revolution Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
